Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>SVG is missing accessible name</p> <div class="element"><svg class="icon"> <use xlink:href="/themes/custom/tinden/dist/icons.svg#icon_sok"></use> </svg></div> <div class="fix">Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>SVG is missing accessible name</p> <div class="element"><svg class="icon"> <use xlink:href="/themes/custom/tinden/dist/icons.svg#arrow-top-white"></use> </svg></div> <div class="fix">Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="h2"> Hva leter du etter i dag? </h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no main landmark</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="pn-ProductNav" id="pnProductNav"> <div class="pn-ProductNav_Contents" id="pnProductNavContents"> <a aria-label="Snarvei av Politisk organisering" class="pn-ProductNav_Link" data-selected="</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to top of the page'</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Go to top of the page" class="footer-gotop" href="#top" rel="nofollow"> <svg class="icon"> <use xlink:href="/themes/custom/tinden/dist/icons.svg#arrow-top-white"></use> </svg> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on Instagram" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.instagram.com/tromsokommune/" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank" title="Tromsø kommune on Instagram"> <s</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on Facebook" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.facebook.com/tromsokommune" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank" title="Tromsø kommune on Facebook"> <svg a</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on Youtube" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.youtube.com/user/Tromsokommune" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank" title="Tromsø kommune on Youtube"> <svg</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on LinkedIn" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/1739226?trk=tyah&trkInfo=idx%3A2-1-6%2CtarId%3A1424171529671%2Ctas%3Atroms%C3%B8" rel="</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Developed by Ramsalt Lab" class="ramsalt" href="https://ramsalt.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Developed by Ramsalt Lab"> <svg aria-hidden="true" focusable="false" height="1</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="input input--search form-autocomplete form-text" data-autocomplete-path="/search_api_autocomplete/sokeresultat" data-drupal-selector="edit-keyword" data-search-api-autocomplete-search="s</div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="input input--search form-autocomplete form-text" data-autocomplete-path="/search_api_autocomplete/sokeresultat" data-drupal-selector="edit-keyword" data-search-api-autocomplete-search="s</div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.2</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.2 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Page is missing h1 heading</p> <div class="element"><body class="path--kalender"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content" tabindex="0"> Hopp til hovedinnhold </a> <div class="dialog-off-canvas-main-canvas" data-off-canvas-ma</div> <div class="fix">Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="h2"> Hva leter du etter i dag? </h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no main landmark</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text is very long (121 characters)</p> <div class="element"><a class="h3__link" href="/hendelse/arctic-frontiers-open-frokostmote-om-reiseliv-i-tromso-et-godt-sted-bo-er-et-godt-sted"> Arctic Frontiers Open, frokostmøte om reiseliv i Tromsø: Et godt ste</div> <div class="fix">Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to top of the page'</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Go to top of the page" class="footer-gotop" href="#top" rel="nofollow"> <svg class="icon"> <use xlink:href="/themes/custom/tinden/dist/icons.svg#arrow-top-white"></use> </svg> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="h2"> Hva leter du etter i dag? </h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>SVG is missing accessible name</p> <div class="element"><svg class="icon" height="20" width="30"> <use xlink:href="/themes/custom/tinden/dist/icons.svg#burger_menu"></use> </svg></div> <div class="fix">Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="h2"> Hva leter du etter i dag? </h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no main landmark</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to top of the page'</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Go to top of the page" class="footer-gotop" href="#top" rel="nofollow"> <svg class="icon"> <use xlink:href="/themes/custom/tinden/dist/icons.svg#arrow-top-white"></use> </svg> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on Instagram" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.instagram.com/tromsokommune/" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank" title="Tromsø kommune on Instagram"> <s</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on Facebook" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.facebook.com/tromsokommune" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank" title="Tromsø kommune on Facebook"> <svg a</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on Youtube" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.youtube.com/user/Tromsokommune" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank" title="Tromsø kommune on Youtube"> <svg</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on LinkedIn" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/1739226?trk=tyah&trkInfo=idx%3A2-1-6%2CtarId%3A1424171529671%2Ctas%3Atroms%C3%B8" rel="</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Developed by Ramsalt Lab" class="ramsalt" href="https://ramsalt.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Developed by Ramsalt Lab"> <svg aria-hidden="true" focusable="false" height="1</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="input input--search form-autocomplete form-text" data-autocomplete-path="/search_api_autocomplete/sokeresultat" data-drupal-selector="edit-keyword" data-search-api-autocomplete-search="s</div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>SVG is missing accessible name</p> <div class="element"><svg class="icon" height="20" width="30"> <use xlink:href="/themes/custom/tinden/dist/icons.svg#burger_menu"></use> </svg></div> <div class="fix">Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>SVG is missing accessible name</p> <div class="element"><svg class="icon" height="20" width="30"> <use xlink:href="/themes/custom/tinden/dist/icons.svg#close-blue"></use> </svg></div> <div class="fix">Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>SVG is missing accessible name</p> <div class="element"><svg class="icon"> <use xlink:href="/themes/custom/tinden/dist/icons.svg#icon_sok"></use> </svg></div> <div class="fix">Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>SVG is missing accessible name</p> <div class="element"><svg class="icon"> <use xlink:href="/themes/custom/tinden/dist/icons.svg#arrow-top-white"></use> </svg></div> <div class="fix">Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="h2"> Hva leter du etter i dag? </h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no main landmark</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="pn-ProductNav" id="pnProductNav"> <div class="pn-ProductNav_Contents" id="pnProductNavContents"> <a aria-label="Snarvei av Helsehjelp" class="pn-ProductNav_Link" data-selected="true" href=</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to top of the page'</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Go to top of the page" class="footer-gotop" href="#top" rel="nofollow"> <svg class="icon"> <use xlink:href="/themes/custom/tinden/dist/icons.svg#arrow-top-white"></use> </svg> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on Instagram" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.instagram.com/tromsokommune/" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank" title="Tromsø kommune on Instagram"> <s</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on Facebook" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.facebook.com/tromsokommune" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank" title="Tromsø kommune on Facebook"> <svg a</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on Youtube" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.youtube.com/user/Tromsokommune" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank" title="Tromsø kommune on Youtube"> <svg</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on LinkedIn" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/1739226?trk=tyah&trkInfo=idx%3A2-1-6%2CtarId%3A1424171529671%2Ctas%3Atroms%C3%B8" rel="</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Developed by Ramsalt Lab" class="ramsalt" href="https://ramsalt.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Developed by Ramsalt Lab"> <svg aria-hidden="true" focusable="false" height="1</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="input input--search form-autocomplete form-text" data-autocomplete-path="/search_api_autocomplete/sokeresultat" data-drupal-selector="edit-keyword" data-search-api-autocomplete-search="s</div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="input input--search form-autocomplete form-text" data-autocomplete-path="/search_api_autocomplete/sokeresultat" data-drupal-selector="edit-keyword" data-search-api-autocomplete-search="s</div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (135 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="h2"> Hva leter du etter i dag? </h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no main landmark</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Data table has no caption or label</p> <div class="element"><table><thead><tr><th>Navn</th><th>Formål</th><th>Lagringstid</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>INGRESSCOOKIE</td><td>Matomo: Teknisk nødvendig informasjonskapsel som brukes for at nettsiden skal funger</div> <div class="fix">Add <caption> element or aria-label to describe the table</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Table header cell missing scope attribute</p> <div class="element"><th>Navn</th></div> <div class="fix">Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Table header cell missing scope attribute</p> <div class="element"><th>Formål</th></div> <div class="fix">Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Table header cell missing scope attribute</p> <div class="element"><th>Lagringstid</th></div> <div class="fix">Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (12 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="http://www.facebook.com/privacy/explanation" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">Facebooks generelle personvernvilkår</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>SVG is missing accessible name</p> <div class="element"><svg class="icon" height="20" width="30"> <use xlink:href="/themes/custom/tinden/dist/icons.svg#burger_menu"></use> </svg></div> <div class="fix">Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.2</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.2 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Page is missing h1 heading</p> <div class="element"><body class="page-node-7529 page-node-landing_page path--node page-node-type--landing-page"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content" tabindex="0"> Hopp til hovedinnhold </a</div> <div class="fix">Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="h2"> Hva leter du etter i dag? </h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no main landmark</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to top of the page'</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Go to top of the page" class="footer-gotop" href="#top" rel="nofollow"> <svg class="icon"> <use xlink:href="/themes/custom/tinden/dist/icons.svg#arrow-top-white"></use> </svg> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on Instagram" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.instagram.com/tromsokommune/" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank" title="Tromsø kommune on Instagram"> <s</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on Facebook" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.facebook.com/tromsokommune" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank" title="Tromsø kommune on Facebook"> <svg a</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on Youtube" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.youtube.com/user/Tromsokommune" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank" title="Tromsø kommune on Youtube"> <svg</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on LinkedIn" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/1739226?trk=tyah&trkInfo=idx%3A2-1-6%2CtarId%3A1424171529671%2Ctas%3Atroms%C3%B8" rel="</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Developed by Ramsalt Lab" class="ramsalt" href="https://ramsalt.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Developed by Ramsalt Lab"> <svg aria-hidden="true" focusable="false" height="1</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="input input--search form-autocomplete form-text" data-autocomplete-path="/search_api_autocomplete/sokeresultat" data-drupal-selector="edit-keyword" data-search-api-autocomplete-search="s</div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>SVG is missing accessible name</p> <div class="element"><svg class="icon" height="20" width="30"> <use xlink:href="/themes/custom/tinden/dist/icons.svg#burger_menu"></use> </svg></div> <div class="fix">Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>SVG is missing accessible name</p> <div class="element"><svg class="icon" height="20" width="30"> <use xlink:href="/themes/custom/tinden/dist/icons.svg#close-blue"></use> </svg></div> <div class="fix">Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="h2"> Hva leter du etter i dag? </h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to top of the page'</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Go to top of the page" class="footer-gotop" href="#top" rel="nofollow"> <svg class="icon"> <use xlink:href="/themes/custom/tinden/dist/icons.svg#arrow-top-white"></use> </svg> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on Instagram" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.instagram.com/tromsokommune/" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank" title="Tromsø kommune on Instagram"> <s</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on Facebook" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.facebook.com/tromsokommune" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank" title="Tromsø kommune on Facebook"> <svg a</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on Youtube" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.youtube.com/user/Tromsokommune" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank" title="Tromsø kommune on Youtube"> <svg</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on LinkedIn" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/1739226?trk=tyah&trkInfo=idx%3A2-1-6%2CtarId%3A1424171529671%2Ctas%3Atroms%C3%B8" rel="</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Developed by Ramsalt Lab" class="ramsalt" href="https://ramsalt.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Developed by Ramsalt Lab"> <svg aria-hidden="true" focusable="false" height="1</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="input input--search form-autocomplete form-text" data-autocomplete-path="/search_api_autocomplete/sokeresultat" data-drupal-selector="edit-keyword" data-search-api-autocomplete-search="s</div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="h2"> Hva leter du etter i dag? </h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no main landmark</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="pn-ProductNav" id="pnProductNav"> <div class="pn-ProductNav_Contents" id="pnProductNavContents"> <a aria-label="Snarvei av Bygge, rive eller endre" class="pn-ProductNav_Link" data-selected</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to top of the page'</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Go to top of the page" class="footer-gotop" href="#top" rel="nofollow"> <svg class="icon"> <use xlink:href="/themes/custom/tinden/dist/icons.svg#arrow-top-white"></use> </svg> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on Instagram" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.instagram.com/tromsokommune/" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank" title="Tromsø kommune on Instagram"> <s</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on Facebook" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.facebook.com/tromsokommune" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank" title="Tromsø kommune on Facebook"> <svg a</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on Youtube" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.youtube.com/user/Tromsokommune" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank" title="Tromsø kommune on Youtube"> <svg</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Developed by Ramsalt Lab" class="ramsalt" href="https://ramsalt.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Developed by Ramsalt Lab"> <svg aria-hidden="true" focusable="false" height="1</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>SVG is missing accessible name</p> <div class="element"><svg class="icon" height="20" width="30"> <use xlink:href="/themes/custom/tinden/dist/icons.svg#burger_menu"></use> </svg></div> <div class="fix">Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="h2"> Hva leter du etter i dag? </h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no main landmark</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="pn-ProductNav" id="pnProductNav"> <div class="pn-ProductNav_Contents" id="pnProductNavContents"> <a aria-label="Snarvei av Barnehage" class="pn-ProductNav_Link" data-selected="true" href="</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to top of the page'</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Go to top of the page" class="footer-gotop" href="#top" rel="nofollow"> <svg class="icon"> <use xlink:href="/themes/custom/tinden/dist/icons.svg#arrow-top-white"></use> </svg> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on Instagram" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.instagram.com/tromsokommune/" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank" title="Tromsø kommune on Instagram"> <s</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on Facebook" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.facebook.com/tromsokommune" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank" title="Tromsø kommune on Facebook"> <svg a</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on Youtube" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.youtube.com/user/Tromsokommune" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank" title="Tromsø kommune on Youtube"> <svg</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on LinkedIn" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/1739226?trk=tyah&trkInfo=idx%3A2-1-6%2CtarId%3A1424171529671%2Ctas%3Atroms%C3%B8" rel="</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Developed by Ramsalt Lab" class="ramsalt" href="https://ramsalt.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Developed by Ramsalt Lab"> <svg aria-hidden="true" focusable="false" height="1</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="input input--search form-autocomplete form-text" data-autocomplete-path="/search_api_autocomplete/sokeresultat" data-drupal-selector="edit-keyword" data-search-api-autocomplete-search="s</div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="input input--search form-autocomplete form-text" data-autocomplete-path="/search_api_autocomplete/sokeresultat" data-drupal-selector="edit-keyword" data-search-api-autocomplete-search="s</div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="h2"> Hva leter du etter i dag? </h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3 class="accordion-term card-header" id="Zqywq-heading"><button aria-controls="Zqywq" aria-expanded="false" class="btn btn-link btn-block text-left" data-target="#Zqywq" data-toggle="collapse" type=</div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no main landmark</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a data-id="https://www.ssb.no/en/statbank/table/09817/" data-type="URL" href="https://www.ssb.no/en/statbank/table/09817/" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">Statistics Norway</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to top of the page'</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Go to top of the page" class="footer-gotop" href="#top" rel="nofollow"> <svg class="icon"> <use xlink:href="/themes/custom/tinden/dist/icons.svg#arrow-top-white"></use> </svg> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no main landmark</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="pn-ProductNav" id="pnProductNav"> <div class="pn-ProductNav_Contents" id="pnProductNavContents"> <a aria-label="Snarvei av Næringsutvikling" class="pn-ProductNav_Link" data-selected="true"</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to top of the page'</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Go to top of the page" class="footer-gotop" href="#top" rel="nofollow"> <svg class="icon"> <use xlink:href="/themes/custom/tinden/dist/icons.svg#arrow-top-white"></use> </svg> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on Instagram" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.instagram.com/tromsokommune/" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank" title="Tromsø kommune on Instagram"> <s</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on Facebook" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.facebook.com/tromsokommune" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank" title="Tromsø kommune on Facebook"> <svg a</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Tromsø kommune on Youtube" class="social-media__link" href="https://www.youtube.com/user/Tromsokommune" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank" title="Tromsø kommune on Youtube"> <svg</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Developed by Ramsalt Lab" class="ramsalt" href="https://ramsalt.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Developed by Ramsalt Lab"> <svg aria-hidden="true" focusable="false" height="1</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="input input--search form-autocomplete form-text" data-autocomplete-path="/search_api_autocomplete/sokeresultat" data-drupal-selector="edit-keyword" data-search-api-autocomplete-search="s</div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="h2"> Hva leter du etter i dag? </h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no main landmark</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (11 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'https://candidate.webcruiter.com/nb-no/Home/companyadverts?&link_source=0&companylock=77790000#search' appears 3 times</p> <div class="element">id="https://candidate.webcruiter.com/nb-no/Home/companyadverts?&link_source=0&companylock=77790000#search"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (18 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="h2"> Hva leter du etter i dag? </h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no main landmark</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to top of the page'</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Go to top of the page" class="footer-gotop" href="#top" rel="nofollow"> <svg class="icon"> <use xlink:href="/themes/custom/tinden/dist/icons.svg#arrow-top-white"></use> </svg> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: '7516' appears 3 times</p> <div class="element">id="7516"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (19 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Element with role='img' needs an accessible name</p> <div class="element"><svg aria-hidden="true" focusable="false" height="15" role="img" viewbox="0 0 152 32" width="70" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <g fill="#ffffff"> <path d="m51.344 10.128h6.068v3.032c1.397-1.794 </div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: 'block-tinden-page-title'</p> <div class="element"><div aria-labelledby="block-tinden-page-title" class="main" id="main-content"> <div class="main-content"> <div> <div class="hidden" data-drupal-messages-fallback=""></div> <div class="block block-syst</div> <div class="fix">Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="h2"> Hva leter du etter i dag? </h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h2 to h4</p> <div class="element"><h4>Støtteordningen består av prosjektstøtte og driftsstøtte</h4></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h2 to h4</p> <div class="element"><h4>Driftstøtte</h4></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no main landmark</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (11 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Developed by Ramsalt Lab" class="ramsalt" href="https://ramsalt.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Developed by Ramsalt Lab"> <svg aria-hidden="true" focusable="false" height="1</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="input input--search form-autocomplete form-text" data-autocomplete-path="/search_api_autocomplete/sokeresultat" data-drupal-selector="edit-keyword" data-search-api-autocomplete-search="s</div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="input input--search form-autocomplete form-text" data-autocomplete-path="/search_api_autocomplete/sokeresultat" data-drupal-selector="edit-keyword" data-search-api-autocomplete-search="s</div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'https://skjema.no/tromso/701785' appears 5 times</p> <div class="element">id="https://skjema.no/tromso/701785"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (63 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="h2"> Hva leter du etter i dag? </h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="http://minsak.no/" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">minsak.no</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="https://innsyn.tromso.kommune.no/sru?commission_id=200201135" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">Se medlemmer i kommunestyret.</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to top of the page'</p> <div class="element"><a aria-label="Go to top of the page" class="footer-gotop" href="#top" rel="nofollow"> <svg class="icon"> <use xlink:href="/themes/custom/tinden/dist/icons.svg#arrow-top-white"></use> </svg> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="h2"> Hva leter du etter i dag? </h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no main landmark</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (12 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="input input--search form-autocomplete form-text" data-autocomplete-path="/search_api_autocomplete/sokeresultat" data-drupal-selector="edit-keyword" data-search-api-autocomplete-search="s</div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'https://tromsog2.ist-asp.com/NO01902-pub/login.htm' appears 3 times</p> <div class="element">id="https://tromsog2.ist-asp.com/NO01902-pub/login.htm"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (48 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="h2"> Hva leter du etter i dag? </h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no main landmark</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (14 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a data-id="https://www.ssb.no/statbank/table/09817/" data-type="URL" href="https://www.ssb.no/statbank/table/09817/" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">SSB.no: Innvandrere og norskfødte med in</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container</p> <div class="element"><a class="menu__link" href="/helse-og-omsorg"> Helse og omsorg </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span
